metadata.research_question: What should a minimal Layer 2 topic scaffold capture before a full review exists?

topic_scope.research_question: What should a minimal Layer 2 topic scaffold capture before a full review exists?
topic_scope.scope_summary: This placeholder keeps the review narrowly focused on demonstrating file structure and visible uncertainty.
inclusion_criteria: Include seed papers that define the topic boundary for the scaffold
exclusion_criteria: Exclude detailed claims that would require a completed review
known_scope_risks: Coverage is intentionally incomplete in this scaffold
seed_paper_rationale: Use one seed paper placeholder to anchor the minimal file set

papers.title: Placeholder seed paper
papers.inclusion_reason: Included only to anchor the scaffold example
papers.comparison_readiness_note: Not ready for evidence-backed comparison beyond seed metadata

coverage_summary: This scaffold intentionally shows only seed-level coverage.
missing_layer1_artifacts: seed-paper-001 has no Layer 1 paper_card artifacts yet

cells.summary: Seed placeholder only; no detailed comparison claim is made.

coverage_warnings: Comparison remains scaffold-level because the only paper is seed_only.
comparison_limits: Do not treat this example as a completed cross-paper comparison.

taxonomy.name: Scaffold-only grouping
taxonomy.grouping_rationale: Groups the single placeholder paper used to anchor the example.

evidence_patterns.pattern: Visible uncertainty is preserved instead of filled in.
evidence_patterns.coverage_note: Pattern is scaffold-level and not based on a full Layer 1 read.

gaps_and_disagreements.issue: No grounded cross-paper synthesis is available yet.
gaps_and_disagreements.why_it_matters: A real literature review needs additional papers and deeper Layer 1 coverage.

recommended_reading_order.order_rationale: Read the seed paper first because it is the only current anchor.

review_limits: This example is intentionally scaffold-level and not a completed literature review.
Coverage is limited to a single seed_only paper with no Layer 1 artifacts.
next_actions: Add real Layer 1 artifacts before making evidence-backed comparisons.
Expand the paper set once the topic boundary is tested on real inputs.
